platform.name: Cryptic Activist
platform.escrow_mechanism: Blockchain-based smart contracts (Ethereum, Base, Binance Smart Chain, Polygon, Arbitrum One, Optimism)
capabilities: Buy cryptocurrency using fiat payment methods
Sell cryptocurrency directly to other users
Select traders based on reputation and trust metrics
differentiators: Non-custodial architecture (no platform control over user funds)
No mandatory KYC for basic trading

assets.fiat_currencies: Supported globally (USDT, AED, TRY, THB, CHF, SEK, KRW, ZAR, SGD, PLN, PHP, NOK, NGN, NZD, MXN, JPY, INR, HKD, EUR, EGP, DKK, CNY, CLP, CAD, BGN, GBP, BRL, BDT, AUD, AMD, ARS, ALL) depending on vendor payment methods

pricing.offer_price: Set by individual vendors (fixed or market-based)

discounts.account_tiers: Fee reductions based on XP level

fee.notes: Final fee may vary depending on user tier and applied discounts

trading.dispute_resolution: 24/7 human moderation with on-chain evidence review

kyc_policy.exceptions: May be required for high-volume trades or specific vendor-defined conditions
